name: ai-career-copilot
description: AI Career Copilot - Next.js frontend + NestJS backend monorepo

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run start:prod" "npm --prefix frontend run start"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
